hero.description: HT Mart helps brands grow with performance marketing, content production, content marketing, social media marketing, and branding — all under one roof.

services.title: Performance Marketing
services.description: Data-driven paid campaigns across Meta and Google built to deliver real, measurable returns.
services.detail: We plan, launch, and optimise paid campaigns across Meta, Google, and other platforms — with full funnel tracking so every rupee spent is accounted for.

services.title: Content Production
services.description: End-to-end production for the visuals your brand needs — from concept to final delivery.
services.detail: Our production team handles everything from concept and shoot planning to filming and editing, producing content built for today's platforms.

services.title: Content Marketing
services.description: Video and photo content crafted to tell your brand's story and stop the scroll.
services.detail: We create video and photo content tailored for your channels — reels, brand films, product photography, and campaign visuals that align with your brand story.

services.title: Social Media Marketing
services.description: Platform-native content and community management that builds an engaged audience.
services.detail: We plan, create, and manage your social media presence — from content calendars to community management — keeping your brand active and consistent.

services.title: Branding
services.description: Visual identities and brand systems that feel consistent, memorable, and unmistakably you.
services.detail: We build brand identities — logos, colour systems, typography, and tone of voice — so your brand feels consistent across every touchpoint.
